svg.text: Ozi CX Dashboard — End-to-End Operational Flow
Roles: Agent → CX Lead → Warehouse → System
Auto-triggered on Return complete | or Manual creation by CX Lead
⚠ COD orders → Wallet credit only (no source refund possible). Admin can override refund amount. Rejected refunds → Failed.
Triggered for: RTO · Cancelled · Failed · Undelivered orders
⚠ Supervisor / Admin can reassign calls. Draft → In Progress (not reset). Completing a call logs drop-off reason and reorder flag.
Triggered when warehouse cannot fulfil one or more items in an order
⚠ Resolution options: Refund Initiated · Replacement Arranged · Partial Refund · Customer Cancelled · No Action Needed. Supervisor can reassign.
Ozi CX Dashboard · Internal Tool · Gurugram · Built March 2026 · PM: Ishaan Sindhu
Roles: Admin · Supervisor · CX Lead · CX Agent · Warehouse User | Data: 50k+ orders · SQLite DB · Streamlit
